summary: Completed testing of 6 NEW view endpoints and 7 NEW tab components. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend tabs render correctly with proper data. Regression tests for core endpoints (/api/health, /api/kpis, /api/incidents) also passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new view endpoints tested: /api/views/customer (20 rows), /api/views/instance (15 regions), /api/views/alarm-lens (4x15 matrix), /api/views/cluster-events (multi_region==1 filter), /api/views/service-requests (SEV3/SEV4 with SR-IDs), /api/views/blackouts (12 synthetic windows). All 7 new frontend tabs verified: Customer View, Instance View, All Events, Service Requests, Blackouts, Alarm Lens, Cluster Events. NOC Incidents tab regression passed including prediction drawer functionality.

TestViewsCustomer.test_customer_view_row_schema: PASSED - all required keys present (reporter, queue, total, open, sev1-4, regions, zoom_yes)

TestViewsInstance.test_instance_view_row_schema: PASSED - all required keys present (region, total, open, sev1-4, multi_region, avg_age_min, zoom_yes)

TestViewsAlarmLens.test_alarm_lens_returns_matrix_structure: PASSED - regions list, severities=[SEV1-4], matrix present

TestViewsServiceRequests.test_service_requests_have_sr_id_and_pri: PASSED - sr_id starts with 'SR-', priority in P3/P4

TestViewsBlackouts.test_blackouts_row_schema: PASSED - id 'BO-####', status in ACTIVE/UPCOMING/COMPLETED, impact in Low/Medium/High

frontend_tests.Customer View Tab: PASSED - customer-view-tab and customer-view-table with 20 rows
frontend_tests.Instance View Tab: PASSED - instance-view-tab and instance-view-table with 15 rows
frontend_tests.All Events Tab: PASSED - all-events-tab and incidents-table with 50 rows
frontend_tests.Service Requests Tab: PASSED - service-requests-tab and sr-table with 50 rows, SR IDs start with 'SR-'
frontend_tests.Blackouts Tab: PASSED - blackouts-tab and blackouts-table with 12 rows, Status/Impact badges render
frontend_tests.Alarm Lens Tab: PASSED - alarm-lens-tab and alarm-lens-table with 4 severity rows and 15 region columns, heat-map cells render numeric counts
frontend_tests.Cluster Events Tab: PASSED - cluster-events-tab and cluster-events-table with 50 rows, Zoom prediction badges render
frontend_tests.NOC Incidents Tab (Regression): PASSED - KPI row, incidents-table, prediction drawer opens/closes

mocked_apis.OCI Iris IncidentAPI: Remains in mock mode (no change in this iteration)
